title: Ethiopian Crepes with Sugar Syrup
description: A sweet and delicate crepe recipe inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, topped with a simple sugar syrup.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the sugars and 1 cup of water over medium heat.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and melted butter.
Add the torn dabo to the cream mixture and stir to combine.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and ladle in the dabo mixture.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the crepe and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve with the warm sugar syrup drizzled on top.
